about.text:
About Us | Taros Nova
What we do:
design and construction of timber structures and buildings
design and construction of steel structures and sheet metal work
design and construction of combined structures and buildings
special focus on glued laminated timber
working with timber
working with CLT panels
working with steel and concrete
atypical non-conventional structures or buildings are a challenge for us
Our rules, as we see them:
We are a company with respect to the individual freedom.
All of our staff share the same commitment to work together to achieve our common goals.
We are listening and open to discussion and do not insist on a single truth.
We observe fair-play and dignified behaviour, following ethical and moral principles.
We are open to new ideas and inventions and enjoy learning new things.
We feel responsibility for our actions towards each other and the communities.
We are capable of self-reflection and appreciate getting a feedback.
Credo:
